tagline: Experience the Joy of Missing Out

hero.headline:
Your Pool, Perfectly Handled Every
Single Week
hero.subheadline: Stop worrying about missed visits, murky water, and unreliable pool guys. JOMO Pool Service shows up like clockwork so you can experience the Joy of Missing Out on pool hassles and focus on what matters -- enjoying your backyard.

services.label: Our Service Plans
services.headline: Pool Care Plans Built for<br class="hidden md:block"> Your Lifestyle
services.subtitle: From weekly chemistry checks to full-service cleaning and equipment repair, JOMO has a plan that fits. Every service tier is designed so you never have to think about your pool again.

cards.title: AquaJOMO - Weekly Chemistry
cards.description: Weekly water chemistry testing and balancing with pump basket and skimmer emptying. Your pool water stays perfectly safe and swim-ready all season long.

cards.title: SparklingJOMO - Bi-Weekly Clean
cards.description: Bi-weekly cleaning ideal for covered salt pools. Includes skimming, brushing, basket cleaning, water balancing, and periodic filter and salt cell maintenance.

cards.title: SparklingJOMO Plus - Full Service
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly pool service with cleaning, water balancing, filter care, and equipment inspections. 50 visits a year for complete peace of mind.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert repair for pumps, filters, automation systems, heaters, and more. Our certified techs diagnose fast and fix it right the first time.

cards.title: RoboJOMO - Robotic Cleaner
cards.description: Add-on robotic pool cleaner placement and maintenance to keep your pool floor and walls spotless between service visits. Set it and forget it.

cards.title: SaltyJOMO - Salt Conversion
cards.description: Salt system installation with ongoing monthly maintenance for a softer, more natural swimming experience. No more harsh chlorine handling.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to the JOMO Lifestyle

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Request a free quote online or call us. We'll ask a few questions about your pool, learn what matters to you, and recommend the right JOMO plan -- no pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Show Up Like Clockwork
steps.description: Your dedicated, CPO-certified technician arrives on schedule every single week. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks -- all handled while you go about your day.

steps.title: Experience the JOMO
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, perfectly balanced, and always swim-ready. No missed visits, no surprises, no stress. Just the Joy of Missing Out on pool maintenance.

about.label: Why Jacksonville Trusts JOMO
about.headline: Founded by Pool Owners Who Got Tired of Bad Service
about.description: In 2020, Mark Slater and John Lewis -- two Jacksonville pool owners frustrated by missed visits, poor communication, and inconsistent results -- decided to build the pool company they wished existed. Partnering with industry veteran Chris Wiedegreen, JOMO Pool Service was born. Every technician is CPO-certified or a Florida Public Pool Specialist, and our entire operation is built around one promise: showing up every week like clockwork so you never have to worry about your pool again.

features.title: Dual-Certified Technicians
features.description: Every JOMO tech holds Certified Pool Operator or Florida Public Pool Specialist credentials. Your pool is in expert hands every visit.

features.title: Reliability Is Our Culture
features.description: No missed visits. No excuses. We built JOMO because we experienced unreliable service ourselves, and we refuse to repeat it.

features.title: Transparent Communication
features.description: You always know what was done and why. Service summaries, honest recommendations, and a team that picks up the phone when you call.

pricing.headline: Simple Plans. Honest Pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the JOMO plan that fits your pool and lifestyle. Every plan includes our reliability guarantee -- we show up, every week, no excuses.

guarantee.headline: Our "Show Up Every Week" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If we ever miss a scheduled visit or you're not satisfied with our work, we'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. JOMO was founded on reliability -- it's literally in our DNA. We don't do excuses, we don't do no-shows, and we don't rest until your pool is perfect.

faqs.question: How quickly can JOMO start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. We serve 12+ communities across Northeast Florida, from Jacksonville Beach to Nocatee and beyond. Call us and we'll get you set up fast.

faqs.question: What makes JOMO different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: JOMO was founded by pool owners who experienced the frustration of unreliable service firsthand. We built our company around showing up every week like clockwork, hiring only certified technicians, and communicating transparently. Our 4.9-star rating from 730+ reviews speaks for itself.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home when you service my pool?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're out. You'll receive a service summary after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Which JOMO plan is right for my pool?
faqs.answer: It depends on your pool type and how hands-off you want to be. AquaJOMO covers weekly chemistry, SparklingJOMO adds bi-weekly cleaning for covered salt pools, and SparklingJOMO Plus is our all-inclusive weekly service. We'll help you choose the right fit during your free consultation.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified and insured?
faqs.answer: Every JOMO technician is fully licensed and insured, and holds Certified Pool Operator (CPO) or Florida Public Pool Specialist (FPPS) credentials. Your pool is always in expert, vetted hands.

testimonials.name: Andy G.
testimonials.text: Tony has been doing a great job keeping our pool looking great and is always friendly with us and our dogs, always making sure the gates are closed when he leaves.

testimonials.name: Verified Customer
testimonials.text: They always are excellent. They are reliable, detail oriented, responsive, trustworthy, and do quality work. They take the time to answer questions and pay attention to details.

testimonials.name: Verified Customer
testimonials.text: Outstanding pool service and a first class operation that goes above and beyond. Highly recommend JOMO to anyone looking for reliable pool care.
